def negative_dependency_injection_bypassed_via_global_singleton():
    rule_id = "dependency_injection_bypassed_via_global_singleton"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Function bypasses the DI container and retrieves a collaborator via a global variable or module-level singleton."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
